channel.title: Data on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Data on Arrans github.io

item.title: run-llama/llama_index
item.description: LlamaIndex is a data framework for your LLM applications

item.title: mendableai/firecrawl
item.description: 🔥 Turn entire websites into LLM-ready markdown or structured data. Scrape, crawl and extract with a single API.

item.title: cloudquery/cloudquery
item.description: The open source high performance ELT framework powered by Apache Arrow

item.title: brianvoe/gofakeit
item.description: Random fake data generator written in go

item.title: montanaflynn/stats
item.description: A well tested and comprehensive Golang statistics library package with no dependencies.

item.title: PRQL/prql
item.description: PRQL is a modern language for transforming data — a simple, powerful, pipelined SQL replacement

item.title: cue-lang/cue
item.description: The home of the CUE language! Validate and define text-based and dynamic configuration

item.title: neherlab/covid19_scenarios
item.description: Models of COVID-19 outbreak trajectories and hospital demand
